task.summary: mysql integration and dark mode fix for dropdown
spring version upgrade, devtools actuator added
dummy controller, openapi integration, global exception handling, response entity use
method and contraint level exception handling
ai ready exception handling using problemdetail
jpaauditing inclusion, base entity impl, logging level impl
backend code setup, monolith converted to multi microservice project

MESSAGE.value: mysql integration and dark mode fix for dropdown
spring version upgrade, devtools actuator added
dummy controller, openapi integration, global exception handling, response entity use
method and contraint level exception handling
ai ready exception handling using problemdetail
jpaauditing inclusion, base entity impl, logging level impl
backend code setup, monolith converted to multi microservice project
